testcase.name: shouldIgnoreEventForNonExistentClaim
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-27 02:49:59.270 [main] [] INFO c.j.c.c.a.event.ClaimEventConsumer - Received AiAnalysisCompletedEvent for claimId: 7030d33b-42da-4552-933e-dcf3ce9a212e with riskScore: 70 2026-06-27 02:49:59.271 [main] [] WARN c.j.c.c.a.event.ClaimEventConsumer - Received AiAnalysisCompletedEvent for unknown or deleted claimId: 7030d33b-42da-4552-933e-dcf3ce9a212e

testcase.name: shouldSkipDuplicateAnalysisResultPersistence
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-27 02:49:59.289 [main] [] INFO c.j.c.c.a.event.ClaimEventConsumer - Received AiAnalysisCompletedEvent for claimId: b7a9ecc8-3230-483e-a3af-b61ea4a2cef1 with riskScore: 40 2026-06-27 02:49:59.293 [main] [] INFO c.j.c.c.a.event.ClaimEventConsumer - AI analysis result persisted and claim status advanced to AI_REVIEW_COMPLETED for claimId: b7a9ecc8-3230-483e-a3af-b61ea4a2cef1

testcase.name: shouldProcessAiAnalysisCompletedEventSuccessfully
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-27 02:49:59.372 [main] [] INFO c.j.c.c.a.event.ClaimEventConsumer - Received AiAnalysisCompletedEvent for claimId: e09efad0-dc20-41c5-9d2e-0ebafd331d77 with riskScore: 55 2026-06-27 02:49:59.375 [main] [] INFO c.j.c.c.a.event.ClaimEventConsumer - AI analysis result persisted and claim status advanced to AI_REVIEW_COMPLETED for claimId: e09efad0-dc20-41c5-9d2e-0ebafd331d77
